I guess I could also think about how everyone has their own quirks and opinions, and that’s part of what makes conversations interesting. It might help to remind myself that my voice adds to the mix, rather than detracting from it. But then again, it’s still tough to shake off that feeling of being judged or dismissed. I guess I just need to keep practicing that kindness toward myself, even when it feels like a stretch. It’s just... a lot to navigate, and I’m not sure how to keep that mindset in the moment when the pressure starts to build.
